The '''police cruiser backup unit''' or '''PCBU''' was a [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] cruiser that was generally [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-piloted. It was developed on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in response to several [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] deaths in the [[Crimson Corridor]].

==Characteristics==
The PCBU was armed with a pair of turret-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and contained a wide variety of [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] and scanners. Though mostly [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Droid/Legends|droids]], the PCBU could also have a sentient officer in control. A backup autopilot insured that the craft would still run if the pilot were incapacitated.<ref name="CorCWorld" />

==History==
Utilized by the [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]], the PCBU was developed during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and put into service in response to several [[Police officer/Legends|police officer]] deaths in the [[Crimson Corridor]]. It used as a patrol and pursuit craft as well as its primary role of providing heavy firepower backup to sentient officers.<ref name="CorCWorld" />

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] had an encounter with a PCBU in which he completely destroyed it and the droid pilot. He also killed the two officers the PCBU was providing backup for.<ref name="DMSH">''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]''</ref>

In [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] times, they were piloted by [[501-Z police droid]]s.<ref name="SWCN3">''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]''</ref>
